title: andinia nummularia
intro: Andinia nummularia, also known as the coin orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Andinia nummularia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Andinia nummularia can be found in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
